title: Settings
subtitle: Core platform behavior and workspace preferences.

success.title: Saved
success.attendanceSaved: Attendance and time settings updated successfully.

errors.title: Error
errors.saveFailed: Could not save settings. Please try again.
errors.password_min_length: Password must be at least 8 characters.

general.title: General
general.orgEmailHint: Organization contact email for notifications and public communications. This is separate from your account login email in Security settings.
general.orgEmailSameAsAccountWarning: This matches your account login email. That is fine—organization contact and login email can be the same, but they are updated in different settings.
general.urlsDesc: Add links to your website, blog, or social media profiles.
general.languageHint: Applies immediately to your workspace view.

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.themeColorDesc: Choose a preferred color for the app.

orgPreferences.title: Organization Preferences
orgPreferences.multiDeptDesc: Allow employees to be assigned to multiple departments at once.
orgPreferences.crossDivisionDesc: Allow employees to be assigned across multiple divisions
orgPreferences.requireDept: Require department assignment during employee creation

attendance.title: Attendance & Time
attendance.workingHoursStandardDesc: Mon–Fri, 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM. Standard office schedule.
attendance.workingHoursHijriDesc: Sun–Thu, 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM. Standard office schedule.
attendance.workingHoursCustomDesc: Uses your existing shift template days and times.
attendance.noHolidays: No holidays configured for this year.
attendance.timeTrackingUnavailable: Copy coordinates and GPS restriction settings are not available yet.
attendance.copyCoordsDesc: Allow users to copy location coordinates from the timeline.
attendance.gpsRestrictionDesc: Restrict users clock in and clock out based on their location.

leave.title: Leave Management
leave.carryUnusedDesc: Move unused leave to the next year.
leave.allowNegativeDesc: Allow employees to use leave days after they finished their leave days.

notification.title: Notification
notification.marketingDesc: Receive emails about new products, features, and more.
notification.socialDesc: Receive emails for friend requests, follows, and more.
notification.securityDesc: Receive emails about your account activity and security.

security.title: Security
security.description: Manage personal account access and system security.
security.accountEmailHint: The email you use to sign in. Organization contact email is managed in General settings.
security.twoFactorAuthenticatorDesc: Use an authenticator app like Google Authenticator or Authy.
security.sessionsAdminOnly: Active sessions can only be viewed by organization administrators and tenant super administrators.
security.twoFactorDesc: Turn on your 2FA for a better security.
security.systemTwoFactor: Turn on Two-Factor Authentication for all employees
security.systemTwoFactorDesc: This will affect all employees in your organization
